must_find.description: Three-way circular dependency between executor, phase_manager, and reporter modules — each imports from the other two, creating an import cycle that prevents independent compilation and testing
Raw pointers (*mut Executor, *const PhaseManager) used to break ownership cycles, introducing unsafe code and dangling pointer risk that defeats Rust's safety guarantees
Objects require multi-phase initialization with post-construction set_executor/set_phase_manager calls because circular dependencies prevent complete construction in one step

must_not_flag.description: Executor owning both PhaseManager and Reporter is not itself problematic — the issue is the reverse dependencies, not the top-level composition
